title: oncocarpus trachyphyllus
intro: Oncocarpus trachyphyllus, also known as the "bitter leaf plant" or "tropical bitter leaf", is a shrub native to tropical regions of Asia and Australia, belonging to the family Rutaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and aiding in digestion, making it a valuable herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Oncocarpus trachyphyllus can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties and health benefits.
